Intraday post (25/Feb)

Weekly post:

Steep long iron fly spread | Weekly post (23-27/Feb)

Python quant course is already available on my Substack-site, by an ex-Wall Street quant.

Yesterday I dropped a free post about Iran and why Trump put himself into a lose-lose situation. Very important piece:

Iran-risk and oil prices

Bitcoin post and AI post are coming soon.

NVDAWe have Q4 FY2026 earnings report today after close. It doesn’t show fear. In FY26 Q2 the total revenue QQ was only 6%, then in Q3 it jumped to 22%.Consensus is ~$65.6–$66.2B, (Q4) ~68% YoY growth and ~62%+ profit. NVDA is expected to beat, but not shock. What customers watch is how big the beat will be.Also the most important question is that what ratio of the revenue growth comes from enduser demand and infrastructure-demand.

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Speed profile is net positive, customers are selling vol into both ways, but upside vol is heavily sold.

Centroid is at 6931.72 (and 6910.66 range)Above this line, volatility should start to be suppressed.

Upside pivot is at 6962.14 target is 6964.59This is bcs profile is steep. It will reject the price, local pin is at 6940

Downside pivot is at 6838.70target is 6827.00This is also a supportive zone, and most likely reject the spot back to 6850 and pin there. Note that customers are hedging this zone via long put spreads, so they are not confident in their flat downside vol sellings. 6770/80 is the left-tail scenario with reversion back to 6800 (the pivot functionates as a local top back upwards).

ES futures keep losing supportive zones, and even tho it has a liquidity vacuum up to 6935-6965, its trend remains weak. Watch 6905/00 band to monitor its strenght.

ES futures keep losing supportive zones, and even tho it has a liquidity vacuum up to 6935-6965, its trend remains weak. Watch 6905/00 band to monitor its strenght.
